subject: Francisco Gaspar-Andres
summary: Francisco Gaspar-Andrés, 48, died Dec 3, 2025 at El Paso hospital after 75 days deteriorating health at Camp East Montana. Sepsis → multi-organ failure. Medical neglect: 54 days symptoms before hospitalization. First of 7 December deaths (deadliest month).

victim_details.name: Francisco Gaspar-Andrés
victim_details.location_of_death: The Hospitals of Providence East, El Paso, TX
victim_details.facility: Camp East Montana, Fort Bliss, El Paso, TX
victim_details.cause_official: Natural causes: liver and kidney failure
victim_details.cause_actual: Medical neglect leading to sepsis and multi-organ failure
